since_last: 75% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +4.11%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 75% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.84% · BTC +0.41% · Gold -0.99% · Nasdaq100 +1.78%. 75% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +4.11%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +4.11%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -1.41%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: HON is the standout at -49.03%
cards.body: Leaders: AMAT +10.48%, KLAC +10.34%, PANW +8.62%, LRCX +8.57%, CRWD +6.61%. Laggards: HON -49.03%, DLR -1.83%, SOUN -1.82%, SMCI -1.55%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.66% at $157.3
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.66% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
